---
talk-title: "Forecasting Season 2024/25 Summary"
talk-short-title: "Season 2025"
talk-subtitle: "State level quantile forecasting of flu and covid hospitalizations"
author: "Dmitry Shemetov & David Weber"
other-authors: ""
repo-address: ""
date: "2025-05-22"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, themer.scss]
    css: tachyons-minimal.css
    logo: "gfx/delphi.jpg"
    chalkboard: true
    width: 1280
    height: 720
    html-math-method: mathjax
    slide-number: true
    fig-format: svg
    fig-align: center
    fig-width: 5.33
    fig-height: 3
    scrollable: false
    history: false
    link-external-icon: true
    link-external-newwindow: true
    code-overflow: wrap
    lang: en-CA
    footer: "{{< meta talk-short-title >}} --- {{< meta repo-address >}}"
    output-file: "season_summary_2025_presentation.html"
---

{{< include _title.qmd >}}

```{r data_setup, include=FALSE}
library(aws.s3)
library(tidyverse)
library(epidatr)
library(epipredict)
library(epidatasets)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.align = "center",
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  cache = FALSE,
  dev = "png"
)
ggplot2::theme_set(ggplot2::theme_bw())
here::i_am("scripts/reports/season_2025_talk/season_summary_2025_presentation.qmd")
suppressPackageStartupMessages(source(here::here("R", "load_all.R")))

our_forecasters <- c("linear", "windowed_seasonal", "windowed_seasonal_nssp", "climate_base", "climate_geo_agged", "climate_linear", "ensemble_windowed", "retro_submission", "CMU-TimeSeries", "seasonal_nssp_latest", "ensemble_mix")

rename_forecasters <- function(df) {
  if (length(df) == 0){
    return(df)
  }
  df %>% mutate(forecaster = case_match(
    forecaster,
    "windowed_seasonal_extra_sources" ~ "windowed_seasonal_nssp",
    "ensemble_linclim_windowed_seasonal" ~ "retro_submission",
    "ens_ar_only" ~ "ensemble_windowed",
    .default = forecaster
    ))
}
forecast_date_seq <- seq(as.Date("2024-11-23"), round_date(Sys.Date() - 3, "week", 6), by = "week")

cache_dir <- file.path(getwd(), "_cache")
dir.create(cache_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
cache_key <- as.character(max(forecast_date_seq))

cached_load <- function(name, fn) {
  path <- file.path(cache_dir, paste0(name, "_", cache_key, ".rds"))
  if (file.exists(path)) {
    readRDS(path)
  } else {
    result <- fn()
    saveRDS(result, path)
    result
  }
}

load_season_forecasts <- function(disease) {
  map_dfr(forecast_date_seq, \(d) {
    get_external_forecasts(paste0("exploration/", as.character(d), "/", disease, "_forecasts.parquet"))
  }) %>%
    rename_forecasters()
}

nhsn_archive_flu   <- cached_load("nhsn_archive_flu",   \() get_nhsn_data_archive("flu"))
nhsn_archive_covid <- cached_load("nhsn_archive_covid", \() get_nhsn_data_archive("covid"))
flu_forecasts      <- cached_load("flu_forecasts",      \() load_season_forecasts("flu"))
covid_forecasts    <- cached_load("covid_forecasts",    \() load_season_forecasts("covid"))

nhsn_flu_latest <- nhsn_archive_flu %>%
  epix_as_of_current() %>%
  filter(geo_value %nin% c("as", "gu", "mp", "vi"))
nhsn_covid_latest <- nhsn_archive_covid %>%
  epix_as_of_current() %>%
  filter(geo_value %nin% c("as", "gu", "mp", "vi"))

flu_scores <- cached_load("flu_scores", \() {
  result <- score_forecasts(nhsn_flu_latest, flu_forecasts, "wk inc flu hosp") %>%
    rename_forecasters()
  if (nrow(result) == 0) return(result)
  result %>% mutate(
    target_end_date = forecast_date + ahead * 7L,
    our_forecaster = forecaster %in% our_forecasters
  )
})
covid_scores <- cached_load("covid_scores", \() {
  result <- score_forecasts(nhsn_covid_latest, covid_forecasts, "wk inc covid hosp") %>%
    rename_forecasters()
  if (nrow(result) == 0) return(result)
  result %>% mutate(
    target_end_date = forecast_date + ahead * 7L,
    our_forecaster = forecaster %in% our_forecasters
  )
})

forecast_week <- flu_scores$forecast_date %>% unique()
forecast_weeks_to_plot <- c(seq.Date(min(forecast_week), max(forecast_week), by = 3*7), as.Date("2025-01-18"), as.Date("2025-02-01"))
```

# Major Forecasting Challenges

- **non-stationarity** - varying vaccination rates, new strains, changing mobility patterns, superspreader events, etc.
- **large seasonal variation (flu)** - season start, duration, and peak size vary
- **lack of seasonal component (covid)** - seasonal pattern in the data is weak or inconsistent (post-pandemic)
- **data quality issues** - initial observations are incomplete, regular reporting delays, reporting errors, etc.
- **few seasons to train on** - NHSN data starts in 2020, the first two seasons are excluded because they were anomalous due to the pandemic, so effectively only 2 seasons of data are available for training

{{< include _data_section.qmd >}}

{{< include _models.qmd >}}

{{< include _flu_scores.qmd >}}

{{< include _covid_scores.qmd >}}

{{< include _future_work.qmd >}}

{{< include _appendix.qmd >}}
